indicators.name: arched ceiling
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can make the space feel cold and uninviting, which is counterproductive to sleep.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: A hard floor is uncomfortable to sleep on and can cause noise, which is detrimental to sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture makes it impossible to use the space as a sleeping area.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The high ceilings, hard floor, and lack of furniture make it unsuitable for sleeping. The arches and lighting fixtures add to the cold, formal atmosphere, further reducing its suitability for sleep.
